Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight * bs."in.sqft..ft2") AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight * bs."in.sqft..ft2") AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/e5a36402aaad9bd7f366884af5edfa8669fc7f4f5f222f28fd58825cdf6d9da3/f22b529d-56b6-4399-9905-0fd1626b7750/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
